comment: Maps Discord author IDs to per-principal EA partitions and binds each partition to its principal display name, runtime + LLM provider/model/key, and per-EA agent definition name. v3 (R-940 §14, 2026-05-02): per-partition runtime + LLM fields. v3 fields (runtime, llmProvider, llmModel, llmKeyVaultRef) default to claude-code + anthropic + claude-opus-4-7 + anthropicKeyVaultRef when absent so v2 records continue to load unchanged. Unmapped author IDs produce an audit-logged refusal rather than silent default routing (Δ D-015 / Migration Plan §14.2.1).
